explanation: Saturn's rings sit at maximum brightness as the planet reaches opposition with Earth.
title: Saturn at Opposition

explanation: Webb's near-infrared camera reveals newborn protostars inside the dust pillars of the Eagle Nebula (M16).
title: Pillars of Creation from Webb NIRCam

explanation: The mid-infrared instrument on Webb maps shock-heated debris of the Cassiopeia A supernova in unprecedented detail.
title: Supernova Remnant Cassiopeia A from Webb MIRI

explanation: A diamond-ring effect closes totality at the April 20 hybrid eclipse over Western Australia.
title: Hybrid Solar Eclipse Diamond Ring

explanation: Venus and Jupiter pair within half a degree against the evening twilight.
title: Conjunction of Venus and Jupiter

explanation: Green comet C/2022 E3 (ZTF) reaches its closest approach to Earth at 0.28 AU.
title: Comet ZTF C/2022 E3 near Earth

explanation: A rare selenelion lets observers see the eclipsed Moon setting opposite the rising Sun.
title: Lunar Eclipse Selenelion

explanation: The full Moon glides in front of Mars, occulting the red planet on December solstice eve.
title: Mars Occultation by the Moon

explanation: Earth's shadow turns the full beaver Moon a deep coppery red during a 90-minute total eclipse.
title: Total Lunar Eclipse Beaver Blood Moon

explanation: A new wide-field mosaic of M31 reveals previously uncharted ionized gas filaments around the Andromeda halo.
title: Andromeda Galaxy Wide-Field

explanation: NASA's DART spacecraft strikes the asteroid moonlet Dimorphos in humanity's first planetary defense test.
title: DART Impact on Asteroid Dimorphos

explanation: Webb's near-infrared image of compact galaxy group Stephan's Quintet reveals interacting tidal arms.
title: Stephan's Quintet from Webb

explanation: Webb's first deep-field image unveils the star-forming Cosmic Cliffs of the Carina Nebula.
title: Carina Nebula Cosmic Cliffs from Webb

explanation: Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, and Saturn align in order from the Sun across the predawn sky.
title: Five-Planet Alignment over the Pacific

explanation: A blood-red eclipsed Moon hangs over an erupting fissure during a 1h25 totality.
title: Total Lunar Eclipse over Volcano

explanation: A slim Moon joins Jupiter and Mercury low in the dawn glow.
title: Crescent Moon Conjunction with Jupiter and Mercury

explanation: Ice crystals near the South Pole refract sunlight into a 22-degree halo flanked by sundogs.
title: Sun Halo and Sundogs over Antarctica

explanation: The Subaru telescope's wide-field camera reveals integrated flux nebulae looping out of M81's halo.
title: M81 Bode's Galaxy from Subaru

explanation: Comet C/2021 A1 (Leonard) sheds a disconnected ion tail after a solar wind shock.
title: Comet Leonard Tail Disruption

explanation: Geminid fireballs streak above Tibetan monasteries on the night of peak activity.
title: Geminid Meteors over Tibet

explanation: A 97% partial lunar eclipse, the longest of the century, darkens the November full Moon.
title: Partial Lunar Eclipse Near-Total

explanation: The Event Horizon Telescope resolves the launching base of a relativistic jet in Centaurus A.
title: Centaurus A Cosmic Jet from EHT

explanation: The first all-civilian orbital crew splashes down off the Florida coast after a three-day Earth orbit.
title: Inspiration4 Crew Dragon Recovery

explanation: Perseid meteors flicker above the standing stones of Stonehenge near the shower peak.
title: Perseids over Stonehenge

explanation: The galactic center looms over the summit telescopes of Mauna Kea on a clear winter night.
title: Milky Way over Mauna Kea

explanation: Sunrise transforms into a ring of fire as the new Moon centers on the rising Sun.
title: Annular Solar Eclipse Ring of Fire over Ontario

explanation: A 15-minute totality drapes the closest full Moon of the year in copper light.
title: Super Flower Blood Moon Total Lunar Eclipse

explanation: A pink supermoon rises behind the columns of the Acropolis in Athens.
title: Pink Supermoon over the Acropolis

explanation: Perseverance's Mastcam-Z captures a wide color panorama of the Jezero crater landing site.
title: Mars 2020 Perseverance Rover First Color Panorama

explanation: Perseverance is lowered onto Jezero crater by the sky crane in this image from the descent stage.
title: Perseverance Skycrane Descent Imaged from Above

explanation: Quadrantid meteors blaze above a Tibetan high-altitude lake during the brief peak.
title: Quadrantid Meteor Shower from Tibet

explanation: Jupiter and Saturn pair within 6 arcminutes in the closest great conjunction since 1623.
title: Great Conjunction of Jupiter and Saturn

explanation: Comet C/2020 F3 (NEOWISE) curves under the Big Dipper bowl during its July apparition.
title: Comet NEOWISE over the Big Dipper

explanation: Mars reaches opposition the size of an 11-meter telescope at 100x: ice cap, Syrtis Major, Hellas basin all visible.
title: Mars at Closest Approach

explanation: Akatsuki's UV imager reveals fast equatorial cloud structures circulating Venus every 4 days.
title: Venus Cloud Patterns from Akatsuki

explanation: An Atlas V launches Perseverance and Ingenuity toward Mars from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station.
title: Mars Perseverance Launch from Cape Canaveral

explanation: Comet NEOWISE displays a dust tail and faint blue ion tail above the Parthenon.
title: Comet NEOWISE over the Acropolis

explanation: The annular phase forms a perfect solar ring at sunrise over the Grand Mosque.
title: Annular Solar Eclipse Ring of Fire over Mecca

explanation: Crew Dragon Endeavour stands on LC-39A ahead of the first crewed commercial launch.
title: SpaceX Demo-2 Crew Dragon Atop Falcon 9

explanation: The closest full Moon of 2020 rises pink-orange over Glastonbury Tor.
title: Pink Supermoon over Glastonbury
